name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Native Windows ChatGPT companion dock with crash-safe startup and live diagnostics.

interface.shortDescription: Dock ChatGPT beside Codex with selected local context
interface.longDescription: Sidecar Dock is a native Windows companion app that magnetically attaches to the Codex desktop window, hosts a persistent ChatGPT session, lets the user choose a saved root Codex thread, gathers bounded local context, and exposes crash-safe startup plus privacy-safe WebView and composer diagnostics without logging the shared context payload.
defaultPrompt: Open the ChatGPT Sidecar Dock installation instructions.
Explain how to validate the native Sidecar Dock alpha.
